description_long: This refrigerator features a modern, rectangular design with a vertically brushed dark gray metallic finish. The front face is divided into two sections, with a prominent vertical handle groove running down the right door and a recessed water or ice dispenser on the left. The sides and back are smooth and unadorned, maintaining the same brushed metal texture throughout. The top is flat, providing a potential surface for placing lightweight objects. The overall appearance is sleek and minimalistic, suitable for contemporary urban environments such as garages, break rooms, or communal spaces. No visible branding or digital controls are present on the exterior.
description: A sleek, dark gray, brushed-metal refrigerator with a vertical handle groove and a recessed dispenser on the front.
description_view_0: Front view showing two doors, a vertical handle groove on the right, and a recessed dispenser on the left.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a smooth, unadorned brushed metal surface.
description_view_2: Rear view with a plain, uninterrupted brushed metal finish and no visible features.
description_view_3: Right side view, similar to the left, with a smooth, featureless brushed metal surface.
attribute_door_handle_style: Vertical recessed groove handle integrated into the right door, flush with the surface.
